description: Add system diagnostics, auto-maintenance, personality response style, comprehensive reasoning rules, and complete telegram bridge rewrite
steps: Create system/auto_maintenance.cpp with idle-time maintenance tasks
Replace tools/telegram_bridge.cpp with full Telegram bot implementation
acceptance_criteria: system/diagnostics.cpp is 250+ lines with CPU temp, disk, memory, network, process, uptime, battery checks
system/auto_maintenance.cpp is 200+ lines with temp cleanup, knowledge compaction, log rotation
mk_brain/personality/response_style.cpp is 200+ lines with 5 personality modes
rules.mk has 40+ inference rules covering inheritance, transitivity, symmetry, causality, negation, domain inference
